SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model

Interface AIiDocumentationTextWriteAccess

All Superinterfaces:
AIiDocumentationElement, AIiDocumentationElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationInlineElement, AIiDocumentationInlineElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationText
All Known Implementing Classes:
AIcDocumentationText
public interface AIiDocumentationTextWriteAccess extends AIiDocumentationText, AIiDocumentationInlineElementWriteAccess
Provides write access to a text element.

The read-only contract is defined by AIiDocumentationText. This capability interface is intended for construction, aggregation, and model-processing phases. Validators, renderers, and other read-only consumers should depend on the read-only interface instead.

This interface currently adds no type-specific write operations. It mirrors the documentation element hierarchy and inherits the write capabilities of its parent write-access interface.
